mapper.select: SELECT cart_idx AS cartIdx, m_id AS mId, menu_name AS menuName, temperature, size, quantity, unit_price AS unitPrice, reg_date AS regDate FROM cart_t WHERE m_id = #{mId} AND menu_name = #{menuName} AND temperature = #{temperature} AND size = #{size} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_t (m_id, menu_name, temperature, size, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{mId}, #{menuName}, #{temperature}, #{size}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT cart_idx AS cartIdx, m_id AS mId, menu_name AS menuName, temperature, size, quantity, unit_price AS unitPrice, reg_date AS regDate FROM cart_t WHERE m_id = #{mId} ORDER BY cart_idx ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_t WHERE m_id = #{mId}
